specs.key_requirements: Defines workspace discovery flow and install algorithm. Lines 217-244 specify workspace detection priority and install behavior.
Defines WorkspaceMode enum (Nx > Jet/pnpm > Single). Lines 47-60 workspace detection priority. Lines 352-398 workspace protocol detection.

codebase.summary: WorkspaceManager with load_config() (lines 60-103): tries jet-workspace.yaml then package.json.workspaces. WorkspaceConfig struct has packages + catalog fields. resolve_workspace_protocol() and is_workspace_protocol() already exist.
PackageManager::install_with_options() (lines 111-280): main install flow. Resolves deps via DependencyResolver, downloads tarballs, hardlinks from ~/.jet-store/. No workspace dep handling yet.
DependencyResolver with resolve_alias() (lines 140-160): handles npm: protocol but not workspace: protocol. resolve_with_prefetch() sends all deps to npm registry.
Install command (lines 318-370): detects WorkspaceMode, dispatches to Nx, Jet workspace, or Single install path.
Lockfile struct stores packages with tarball URL + shasum. No workspace: flag or local path support yet.

gaps: workspace.rs load_config() does not check pnpm-workspace.yaml
mod.rs install_with_options() does not filter workspace: deps before resolution
resolver.rs resolve_alias() does not handle workspace: prefix — sends to npm registry
lockfile.rs has no representation for workspace-linked packages
No catalog: field parsing from pnpm-workspace.yaml (struct has field but no parser for pnpm format)
